sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15743" key="a)rtola/gunos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρτο-λάγῡνος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λᾰ] πήρα</foreign> bag <sense id="n15743.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with bread and bottle,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.38</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.</author> </bibl> Rex).</sense> </entryFree>
